title: ViewAgentResponse
description: Structured JSON output from a view-agent query invocation.

view_name.description: Name of the view that was processed

mental_model_updated.description: Whether the mental model was modified during this invocation

stale_sections_refreshed.description: Section paths that were refreshed during the staleness check step

metadata_files_created.description: IDs of new MetadataFiles created during this invocation

error.description: Error message if the invocation failed, null otherwise
